license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x8tfrwn
title: Sanger Sequencing
author: Celeste M M. Karch

steps_raw.instruction: Set up PCR on ice, add reagents in desired order (however it is best to add the polymerase and gDNA last). %s %s %s %s
Run 15 µL of each sample on a 2% gel to determine presence of PCR product.
Run product on gel at 150 V for 01:30:00 .
After confirming the presence of PCR product, move on to sequencing reaction protocol below: %s %s Send out a Forward and a Reverse for each sample.
